projects.name: Slyr.cpp
projects.desc: SLYR is a dual-compute avionics platform that separates deterministic flight control from AI-assisted decision making — enforced at the hardware level.

projects.name: BloatWare
projects.desc: BloatWare is discord bot serving directly under KGB, Our beloved commrade!

projects.name: W.Decision-Matrix
projects.desc: A zero-dependency, single-file weighted decision matrix tool. Add criteria with adjustable weights, add options, score each cell on a 0–10 stepper, and get a ranked results list with animated bars

projects.name: OpenNH Download
projects.desc: A Chrome extension that bulk-downloads nhentai galleries into a ZIP archive with one click. Reads the real CDN image URL directly from the page DOM — handles all i1, i2, i3… subdomains automatically.

projects.name: TuTiFruITy ChAn
projects.desc: A Dihcord bot deployed all across the servers with a mission to collect user data and so shii, {She might be a Mossad agent though} so watchout!

projects.name: emtypyie-cli
projects.desc: Package manager and terminal runtime for the EMTYPYIE ecosystem. Rewritten in C from v2.5.0 'Wandering Witches' onward — dependency-free native binary with a built-in LLAMA inference engine (Larpino). Node.js build kept for compatibility but now legacy.
